Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to provide a DuckDB SQL query that filters out cases with more than 6 events, returning only events from cases with <=6 events. The user wants a single query.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Probably using a subquery or CTE to count events per case, then filter. Ensure we include all columns from event_log.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So: SELECT * FROM event_log WHERE case_id IN (SELECT case_id FROM event_log GROUP BY case_id HAVING COUNT(*) <= 6);

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Could also use window function but IN is fine. Provide explanation.
